queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the determinants of default probability associated with applicants lacking a checking account.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Investigating the risk-mitigating determinants of default associated with critical or alternative existing credit histories.

queries.feature_definition: Credit amount requested by the applicant.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the credit risk drivers related to the magnitude of requested credit amounts and their impact on reduced default probability.
